parents.subject: Revert "LU-4801 ldlm: discard l_lock from struct ldlm_lock."

commit.subject: LU-10958 tests: data corruption due to RPC reordering
commit.message:
LU-10958 tests: data corruption due to RPC reordering

This commit adds a new test case. The client
can receive a reply from from the original RPC
or the resent one, clearing PG_Writeback and
making it possible to modify the same page on
the client. However, the resent RPC or the
original RPC can proceed after this modification.
Eventually, stale data gets to disk.

Change-Id: I3d56bcb900e37da0d00b2b4a8505463a0352c988
Signed-off-by: Andrew Perepechko <c17827@cray.com>
Cray-bug-id: LUS-5578
Test-Parameters: fortestonly alwaysuploadlogs testlist=recovery-small envdefinitions=ONLY=138,PTLDEBUG=-1,DEBUG_SIZE=300
